_meta.method: User-flagged additions: Korean Zen presence in South Florida that the round-3 USA agent missed.
_meta.coverageEstimate: Specific gap-fixes; not a comprehensive sweep.

places.name: Bo Hyun Sa
places.notes: Korean Buddhist temple of the Chogye Order serving the Korean Buddhist community of Fort Lauderdale, Miami, and West Palm Beach. Hosts the South Florida Zen Group (Kwan Um) for Saturday-morning practice.

places.name: South Florida Zen Group
places.lineage: Korean Seon (Kwan Um School of Zen — Seung Sahn)
places.notes: Kwan Um sangha covering the Fort Lauderdale / Miami / West Palm Beach corridor; sittings at Bo Hyun Sa (Southwest Ranches) Saturday 9am and at the Zen Mystery Café in Dania Beach.
